storyBeat: 和尚 Sanzang — 一個安靜會讀書的人

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 monk = 和尚
🔑 temple = 寺廟
🔑 read = 讀
🔑 quiet = 安靜的
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Long ago in China, a young monk named 三藏 (Sanzang) lived in a quiet temple.
questions.explanationZh: 很久以前在中國,一個叫三藏的年輕和尚住在安靜的寺廟裡。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: He read holy books every day, from morning until late at night.
questions.explanationZh: 他每天讀經書,從早上讀到深夜。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: He did not like loud talk or big parties.
questions.questionEn: Was Sanzang a quiet kind of person?
questions.explanationZh: 推理:不喜歡吵鬧 → 是安靜的人 → 答 Yes

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: His heart was soft. He cared about people he had never met.
questions.explanationZh: 他心地很軟,連沒見過的人也關心。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Sanzang spent each day with books and tea, and slept on a thin mat.
questions.question: How did Sanzang live every day?
options: on a fast horse all day
questions.explanationZh: 推理:書 + 茶 + 薄草蓆 → 簡單的東西和讀書 (paraphrase)。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: But the books in his temple were old and not enough.
questions.explanationZh: 但他寺廟裡的書又舊又不夠。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: He felt there was much more to learn far, far away.
questions.question: What did Sanzang feel about his learning?
options: he had learned all he needed
there was still much more to know
questions.explanationZh: 推理:much more to learn → 還有很多要知道的 (paraphrase)。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Sometimes he stood by the gate and looked toward the west.
questions.explanationZh: 有時他站在寺門口,望向西邊。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: How did Sanzang feel standing by the gate?
questions.question: How did he feel?
questions.explanationZh: 望向西邊想學更多 → 準備好迎接新東西。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: One morning, a man in fine yellow clothes came to the temple door...
questions.explanationZh: 有一天早上,一個穿黃色華服的人來到寺廟門口……

storyBeat: 皇帝的請求 — 去西方拿回真經

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 emperor = 皇帝
🔑 ask = 請求
🔑 west = 西方
🔑 holy book = 經書
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: The man said, "The 皇帝 (Emperor) wants to see you at his palace."
questions.explanationZh: 那個人說:「皇帝想在宮裡見你。」

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Sanzang put on his clean robe and went without saying no.
questions.questionEn: Did Sanzang turn down the invitation?
questions.explanationZh: 推理:他穿衣服就去了 → 沒拒絕 → 答 No

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: At the palace, the Emperor sat on a tall chair and looked tired.
questions.explanationZh: 在皇宮裡,皇帝坐在高高的椅子上,看起來很累。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: "My people need new holy books from India. Will you go?" he asked.
questions.question: What did the Emperor want Sanzang to do?
options: stay in the city as a teacher
travel far and bring back books
build a new wall by the river
questions.explanationZh: 推理:從印度拿經書回來 → 走遠路把書帶回來 (paraphrase)。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Sanzang knew the road was long. He knew it could take many years.
questions.explanationZh: 三藏知道路途很遠,可能要走很多年。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: But he bowed and said, "I will go. I will not come back empty."
questions.question: What did Sanzang promise the Emperor?
options: to bring the holy books home
questions.explanationZh: 推理:will not come back empty → 把經書帶回家 (paraphrase)。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: The Emperor stood up and gave Sanzang a soft yellow scarf.
questions.explanationZh: 皇帝站起來,給三藏一條軟軟的黃色圍巾。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: "From today, you are my brother of the road," the Emperor said.
questions.questionEn: Did the Emperor treat Sanzang as someone very close?
questions.explanationZh: 推理:叫他兄弟 → 當作親近的人 → 答 Yes

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: How did Sanzang feel after the Emperor's words?
questions.question: How did he feel?
questions.explanationZh: 皇帝叫他兄弟 → 受到尊重,認真起來。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: That night, Sanzang sat in his room and packed a very small bag...
questions.explanationZh: 那天晚上,三藏坐在房裡,打包了一個非常小的包……

storyBeat: 從長安出發 — 一匹馬,一個小包

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 horse = 馬
🔑 bag = 包
🔑 leave = 離開
🔑 city gate = 城門
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: At sunrise, Sanzang stood at the city gate of 長安 (Chang'an).
questions.explanationZh: 天亮的時候,三藏站在長安的城門口。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: He had one brown horse and one small bag on his back.
questions.question: How much did Sanzang carry?
options: only a horse and a tiny bag
questions.explanationZh: 推理:一匹馬 + 小包 → 只有一匹馬和小包 (paraphrase)。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Many people waved goodbye, but he did not bring even one friend.
questions.questionEn: Was Sanzang starting this long trip alone?
questions.explanationZh: 推理:沒帶半個朋友 → 一個人出發 → 答 Yes

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: The Emperor poured a cup of clear water from the city's earth.
questions.explanationZh: 皇帝倒了一杯城裡泥土的清水。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: "Drink this. Remember the dust of your home," he said softly.
questions.question: Why did the Emperor give the water?
options: so Sanzang would not get lost
so he would remember his country
to make him sleep at night
to pay him for the trip
questions.explanationZh: 推理:記得家鄉的泥土 → 讓他記得自己的家鄉 (paraphrase)。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Sanzang drank it all. He bowed three times to the east.
questions.explanationZh: 三藏全喝了,並向東邊鞠了三個躬。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Then he turned the horse to the west and walked out of the gate.
questions.explanationZh: 然後他把馬頭轉向西邊,走出城門。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Behind him, the city walls grew small in the morning light.
questions.question: What happened as Sanzang walked away?
options: his home looked smaller and smaller
the sky turned dark and rainy
questions.explanationZh: 推理:walls grew small → 看起來越來越小 (paraphrase)。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: How did Sanzang feel leaving his home behind?
questions.question: How did he feel?
questions.explanationZh: 離開家但仍要走 → 難過但勇敢。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Step by step, the road ahead opened up like a long brown river...
questions.explanationZh: 一步又一步,前方的路像一條長長的褐色河流展開……

storyBeat: 走了好多天 — 沙漠、風、和孤單

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 desert = 沙漠
🔑 wind = 風
🔑 thirsty = 渴
🔑 lonely = 孤單
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Day by day, Sanzang walked. The green hills became yellow sand.
questions.explanationZh: 一天又一天,三藏走著走著,綠色的山變成了黃色的沙。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: The wind pushed dust into his eyes and into his mouth.
questions.question: What did the desert wind do to Sanzang?
questions.explanationZh: 推理:dust into his eyes and mouth → 把沙吹進他臉上 (paraphrase)。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: He drank from his bottle in small careful sips.
questions.questionEn: Did Sanzang have a lot of water to spare?
questions.explanationZh: 推理:小心地一小口一小口 → 水不多 → 答 No

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: At night, the desert was cold. He had only a thin blanket.
questions.explanationZh: 晚上沙漠很冷,他只有一條薄薄的毯子。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: He had no friend to talk with. The stars were his only company.
questions.question: Who was with Sanzang at night?
options: no one, just the night sky
questions.explanationZh: 推理:no friend, stars only company → 沒人,只有夜空 (paraphrase)。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Some nights he closed his eyes and pictured his old temple.
questions.explanationZh: 有時候晚上他閉上眼睛,在腦中想著舊寺廟。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Each morning he woke up and walked on, even when his feet hurt.
questions.question: What did Sanzang do every morning?
questions.explanationZh: 推理:walked on, even when feet hurt → 繼續往西走 (paraphrase)。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: The road did not end. Some days, it felt like the road never would.
questions.explanationZh: 路沒有盡頭,有些日子,他覺得這條路永遠走不完。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: How did Sanzang feel after so many days alone?
questions.question: How did he feel?
questions.explanationZh: 走那麼多天還沒到 → 孤單但沒停下。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Then one afternoon, far ahead, a huge dark shape rose from the sand...
questions.explanationZh: 然後有一天下午,遠方,有個巨大黑色的形狀從沙地裡升起來……

storyBeat: 巨大的山 — 一個聲音在叫他

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 mountain = 山
🔑 voice = 聲音
🔑 call = 叫
🔑 huge = 巨大的
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Sanzang came close to a huge mountain named 五行山 (Five Phases).
questions.explanationZh: 三藏走近一座叫五行山的巨大山。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Five tall stone fingers rose into the sky like a giant hand.
questions.question: What did the mountain look like?
questions.explanationZh: 推理:five stone fingers like a giant hand → 石頭的巨人手 (paraphrase)。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: His horse stopped and would not move. Its ears went flat.
questions.explanationZh: 他的馬停下來,不肯動,耳朵貼平。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: The wind around the mountain was very still and very strange.
questions.questionEn: Did the place feel like an ordinary spot?
questions.explanationZh: 推理:風很靜很怪 → 不是普通地方 → 答 No

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Then a deep voice came from under the rocks. "Master! Master!"
questions.explanationZh: 然後岩石下傳來一個低沉的聲音:「師父!師父!」

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Sanzang looked all around but saw no person near the path.
questions.question: What did Sanzang notice about the voice?
options: no one could be seen there
questions.explanationZh: 推理:saw no person → 看不到那邊有人 (paraphrase)。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: "I am under the mountain! Please come close!" the voice called again.
questions.explanationZh: 「我在山下!請靠近!」那個聲音又叫了一次。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Sanzang took a slow breath. He stepped closer to the cold stone.
questions.question: How did Sanzang move toward the voice?
questions.explanationZh: 推理:slow breath + stepped closer → 慢慢小心地走 (paraphrase)。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: How did Sanzang feel about the strange voice?
questions.question: How did he feel?
questions.explanationZh: 聲音怪但他想知道 → 小心又好奇。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Between two huge rocks, two bright eyes blinked up at him...
questions.explanationZh: 兩塊巨石之間,兩顆明亮的眼睛眨著看著他……

storyBeat: 石下的猴子 — 被壓 500 年了

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 monkey = 猴子
🔑 stone = 石頭
🔑 under = 下面
🔑 locked = 鎖住的
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Under the rocks was a small monkey with a brown face and gold eyes.
questions.explanationZh: 石頭下面有一隻小猴子,棕色臉,金色眼睛。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Only his head and one arm could move from the heavy stone.
questions.question: How much of the monkey could move?
options: only his head and one arm
questions.explanationZh: 推理:only head and one arm → 只有頭和一隻手 (paraphrase)。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: He smiled at Sanzang, but he could not even sit up.
questions.questionEn: Was the monkey held there by the mountain?
questions.explanationZh: 推理:不能坐起來 → 被山壓住 → 答 Yes

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: "I have been locked here for five hundred years," the monkey said.
questions.explanationZh: 「我被鎖在這裡五百年了。」猴子說。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Sanzang's eyes grew wide. Five hundred years was so very long.
questions.question: How did Sanzang feel about the time?
options: thought it was a short stay
was surprised by a long, long time
optionsZh: 對非常久的時間感到驚訝
questions.explanationZh: 推理:eyes grew wide + 500 years so long → 對非常久的時間感到驚訝 (paraphrase)。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: "Long ago, I was loud and proud. The sky god put me here," he added.
questions.explanationZh: 「很久以前,我又吵又驕傲,天神把我關在這裡。」他又說。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: "Now I am sorry. I have had a long time to think."
questions.question: How did the monkey feel about his past?
questions.explanationZh: 推理:now I am sorry + long time to think → 後悔了,變了 (paraphrase)。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Sanzang knelt down by the rocks and listened with a soft heart.
questions.explanationZh: 三藏跪在石頭旁,用柔軟的心去聽。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: How did Sanzang feel toward the trapped monkey?
questions.question: How did he feel?
questions.explanationZh: 三藏心軟 → 覺得溫柔,替他難過。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: "Master, please pull the seal from the top. Only you can free me..."
questions.explanationZh: 「師父,請把山頂上的封印拿走,只有你能放我自由……」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 free = 自由的
🔑 protect = 保護
🔑 student = 徒弟
🔑 together = 一起
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Sanzang climbed slowly up the side of the huge mountain.
questions.explanationZh: 三藏慢慢爬上巨山的側面。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: On the very top was a yellow paper with old gold writing.
questions.question: What was at the top of the mountain?
questions.explanationZh: 推理:yellow paper + old gold writing → 一張有舊字的紙 (paraphrase)。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: He held the corner of the paper and pulled it off the rock.
questions.explanationZh: 他抓住紙的一角,從石頭上把它撕下來。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Suddenly, the whole mountain shook and bright light came out.
questions.explanationZh: 推理:山搖 + 光亮 → 封印很有力量 → 答 Yes

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: The five stone fingers fell away. The monkey jumped up high.
questions.explanationZh: 五根石頭手指碎開,猴子高高跳起來。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: He landed in front of Sanzang and bowed his head all the way down.
questions.question: What did the monkey do first when free?
questions.explanationZh: 推理:bowed his head all the way down → 鞠躬感謝三藏 (paraphrase)。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: "Master, my name is 孫悟空 (Sun Wukong)," the monkey said.
questions.explanationZh: 「師父,我的名字是孫悟空。」猴子說。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: "From today, I will walk with you. I will protect you on the road."
questions.question: What did Wukong promise Sanzang?
options: to keep him safe on the trip
questions.explanationZh: 推理:walk with you + protect on the road → 在路上保護他平安 (paraphrase)。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: How did Sanzang feel about his new student?
questions.question: How did he feel?
questions.explanationZh: 他有了徒弟 → 溫暖,不再孤單。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Master and student turned to the west and walked on together...
questions.explanationZh: 師父和徒弟轉向西方,一起繼續走……
